scripts.build: tinacms build --skip-cloud-checks --no-client-build-cache & TINA_PID=$!; sleep 10 && next build; kill $TINA_PID 2>/dev/null; wait $TINA_PID 2>/dev/null
scripts.build-local: tinacms build --local --skip-cloud-checks & TINA_PID=$!; sleep 10 && next build; kill $TINA_PID 2>/dev/null; wait $TINA_PID 2>/dev/null
